subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the peerless Lord, that thou hast quaffed from the chalice of bounty through the hands of divine favors and attained thereunto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد کن خداوند بی مانند را که کاس عطا را از ایادی الطاف آشامیدی و بان فائز
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @living waters; water of life
